title: MeowKit harness artifact governance metadata
description: Governance metadata applied to every harness artifact (skills, agents, rules, commands, hooks). Skills and agents carry these fields in YAML frontmatter; rules, commands, and hooks carry them as entries in .claude/harness-inventory.json. Four fields are required; context_cost and depends_on are optional.

owner.description: Governance domain that owns this artifact. Distinct from install-metadata.ts 'owner' (which tracks install provenance: meowkit|user|meowkit-modified). Heuristics: jira-* → jira, confluence-* → confluence, gate-*/privacy-*/secret-scrub* → security, memory* → memory, default → utility.

criticality.description: Impact of this artifact being incorrect or absent. Default seed value: medium. Hand-promote to critical/high only for safety-net artifacts (privacy-block, gate-enforcement, gate-rules, core lifecycle skills). low is an explicit later opt-down.

status.description: Lifecycle state. Default: active. Deprecated artifacts are retained for compatibility; experimental artifacts are opt-in and may change without notice.

runtime.description: Execution environment. claude-code: requires Claude Code surfaces (Agent tool, hooks). portable: pure-text convention, runnable in any LLM harness. experimental: runtime requirements undefined.

context_cost.description: Optional. Estimated token footprint when this artifact is loaded into context. Promoted from meowkit.context_cost for skills; meowkit block copy preserved for backward compatibility with skills-discovery.ts.

depends_on.description: Optional. Artifact IDs (skill name, agent name, or registry key) this artifact depends on at runtime. Used by the inventory command for dependency graph analysis.
